checks.description: Guardrail: do not assume a fixed latency for the concatenation; only require that after a finite number of clock cycles following two valid inputs, valid_out becomes asserted and data_out stabilizes.
checks.pass_condition: There exists some non-zero number of clock cycles after the second valid_in where valid_out=1 and data_out holds a stable 16-bit value without X/Z.
checks.trigger_condition: After detecting two consecutive cycles with valid_in=1.

checks.pass_condition: After two valid_in cycles, valid_out asserts and data_out equals {first_data_in, second_data_in} with no X/Z.
checks.trigger_condition: When a rising edge of clk occurs with valid_in asserted.
